summary:
Now the HTML pages. Let me start with the homepage:
Continuing — three files remain (shop, history, site_intent.json).
All eight HTML pages, the shared stylesheet, the interactions script, and `site_intent.json` are in place.

**Summary**

Built the Xerox Pressing Co. site as a gritty, zine-brutalist riso-printed fanzine. Every visual is produced in CSS — no external assets — including:

- newsprint paper grain (layered radial gradients) plus a halftone screen overlay and a fixed riso pink/cyan misregistration wash
- vinyl-out-of-sleeve mockups (gradient sleeve + radial-gradient disc + box-shadow pink/cyan offsets) in 6 sleeve styles and 3 label colors
- halftone artist portraits (silhouette via radial gradients with screen-blended dot pattern + pink and cyan misregistered ink blots)
- masking-tape corners, marker scrawls, torn-paper press clippings, scissor tear-off newsletter strip, sold-out rubber stamp, inkjet streak dividers, stenciled chapter numbers

Interactions in vanilla JS: sticky bottom **audio player** (play/pause, prev/next, click-to-seek + auto-progress scrubber, "Now Spinning" marquee, queue popout listing the 10-track label sampler), homepage sampler rows that load tracks, roster genre-chip filter, "Hear them" buttons that cue artist tracks, catalog format/year/in-stock filters, **flip-to-B-side** release cards, tour region filter + hide-sold-out toggle, variant swatch selector on the release page, an add-to-cart counter persisted in localStorage, and a no-op newsletter form with a "Stamped." confirmation.

All required text strings ("Xerox Pressing Co.", "Now Spinning", "Roster", "Catalog", "Tour", "Merch", "History", "Est. 2014  —  Brooklyn / Glasgow") are present, and the layout collapses cleanly at ≤980px (and again at ≤560px) into stacked cards, single-column zine columns, and a slim mobile player bar.

**Files written**

- `index.html` — masthead, oversized misregistered headline, featured XRX-047 release, news teasers, 10-track sampler, tear-off newsletter
- `roster.html` — 16 asymmetric trading-card artist entries with genre chip filter + demo policy
- `artist.html` — Sable Circuit detail: halftone hero, 3-col bio, pull-quotes, discography rail, press clippings, tour dates
- `catalog.html` — left-rail XRX-### index, format/year/stock filters, 12 flippable release cards, pre-order banner
- `release.html` — XRX-039 *Pink Static* detail: vinyl mockup, variant swatches, tracklist with cue buttons, credits ledger, liner notes
- `tour.html` — 26 typewriter tour rows with sold-out stamps, region chips, tickets-left toggle, taped poster gallery, promoter brief
- `shop.html` — category sidebar + contact-sheet grid of 18 products (FR-001 → FR-018) with bundle banner and shipping bar
- `history.html` — 4-chapter zine spread (2014 / 2017 / 2020 / 2023), 3-col body, footnotes, photo blocks, annotated catalog timeline, colophon
- `css/style.css` — full stylesheet (palette, paper grain, riso overlays, sleeve/vinyl mockups, halftone portraits, player bar, responsive)
- `js/app.js` — player state, sampler/queue, filters, flip cards, cart counter, variant selector, newsletter handler
- `site_intent.json` — concept-as-implemented manifest
All eight HTML pages, the shared stylesheet, the interactions script, and `site_intent.json` are in place.
